introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: Mentra ("we") values your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information when you use our services.

provided.title: 2.1 Information You Provide
provided.userContent: User content — tasks, schedules, notes, forum posts, mood data

automatic.title: 2.2 Automatically Collected Information
automatic.usageData: Usage data — Pomodoro sessions, productivity statistics, level and EXP
automatic.technicalData: Technical data — browser type, IP address, access time

thirdParty.title: 2.3 Information from Third Parties
thirdParty.content: If you log in using Google or Facebook, we receive your name, email, and profile photo from those service providers in accordance with the permissions you grant.

items.storeData: Store your tasks, schedules, and productivity data
items.aiFeatures: Provide AI chat features and recommendations
items.emailVerification: Send OTP verification emails and password resets

dataStorage.title: 4. Data Storage
dataStorage.content: Your data is stored on secure servers. Passwords are encrypted using bcrypt hashing. Authentication tokens use Laravel Sanctum. We do not store passwords in plain text.

dataSharing.title: 5. Data Sharing
dataSharing.intro: We do not sell your personal data. Your data is only shared under the following conditions:

items.publicForum: Public forum — messages you send in the forum can be viewed by other users
items.serviceProviders: Service providers — we use third-party services for email (Gmail SMTP) and AI (OpenAI) that process data as needed
items.legalObligations: Legal obligations — if required by applicable law

thirdPartyServices.title: 6. Third-Party Services
thirdPartyServices.intro: We use the following third-party services:

items.openaiApi: OpenAI API — for AI chat and agent features
items.gmailSmtp: Gmail SMTP — for sending verification emails and notifications

thirdPartyServices.note: Each of these services has its own privacy policy governing their data processing.

security.title: 7. Security
security.intro: We implement security measures to protect your data, including:

items.rateLimiting: Rate limiting on sensitive endpoints (OTP, password reset)
items.validation: Input validation and sanitization on all forms

security.disclaimer: However, no method of electronic transmission or storage is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.

yourRights.title: 8. Your Rights

items.access: Access — view the personal data we store about you
items.delete: Delete — request deletion of your account and data
items.export: Export — request a copy of your data

yourRights.contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at mentra@support.com.

cookies.title: 9. Cookies
cookies.content: We use browser localStorage to store authentication tokens and user preferences. We do not use third-party tracking cookies for advertising purposes.

minors.title: 10. Minors
minors.content: Our Service is not intended for children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect data from children under 13. If you become aware that a minor has provided data to us, please contact us.

policyChanges.title: 11. Policy Changes
policyChanges.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be published on this page with a new update date.

contact.title: 12. Contact
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at mentra@support.com.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using Mentra ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our Service.

serviceDescription.title: 2. Service Description
serviceDescription.content: Mentra is a productivity platform that provides task management, Pomodoro sessions, scheduling, mood tracking, AI chat, community forums, and gamification through forest tree care. The Service is designed to help users organize their activities and improve their productivity.

userAccount.title: 3. User Account
userAccount.intro: To use the Service, you must create an account by providing accurate and complete information. You are responsible for:

items.password: Maintaining the confidentiality of your account password
items.activity: All activity that occurs under your account
items.notify: Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account
items.accurate: Ensuring your account information is always accurate and up to date

acceptableUse.title: 4. Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.intro: You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes. You are not permitted to:

items.illegal: Use the Service for illegal or unauthorized purposes
items.disrupt: Disrupt or damage the Service or connected servers
items.harmful: Upload content that is harmful, offensive, or infringes on the rights of others
items.unauthorized: Attempt to access other users' accounts without permission
items.bots: Use bots, scrapers, or other automated tools without written permission

userContent.title: 5. User Content
userContent.content: You retain ownership of content you create through the Service (tasks, notes, forum posts, etc.). By uploading content, you grant Mentra a non-exclusive license to store and display that content in order to provide the Service to you.

aiFeatures.title: 6. AI Features
aiFeatures.content: Mentra provides AI chat and AI agent features to assist with productivity. AI responses are informational and should not be considered professional advice. We do not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of AI-generated responses.

availability.title: 7. Service Availability
availability.content: We strive to provide the Service continuously, but do not guarantee that the Service will always be available without interruption. We reserve the right to perform maintenance, updates, or changes to the Service at any time.

termination.title: 8. Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these Terms of Service. You may also delete your account at any time through account settings.

liability.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: The Service is provided "as is" without any warranties. Mentra is not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of the Service.

changes.title: 10. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. Changes will take effect immediately upon publication on this page. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.title: 11. Contact
contact.content: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at mentra@support.com.
